---
title: ""
description: "Some simple tricks for cutting down that digital bloat"
author: "Luke"
date: "2024-08-24"
categories:
  - software
  - phone
image: "images/.png"
comments:
    utterances:
      #image needed
      repo: lukmayer/site_comments
      theme: github-dark
      issue-term: url

draft: true
---


- Turn off notifications for anything not so important
- Replace apps with bookmarks
- Remove apps you do not use
- Android derivatives:
    - use a custom launcher
    - Hide apps
    - out of sight out of mind for other UI stuff
    - minimal homescreen
